examples: It turned out to be a great day.
She turned out to be right.
The movie turned out better than expected.
Don't forget to turn out the gas.
She turned out all the lights.
They turned out the fire before leaving.
It turned out that he was lying.
Turn out the lights before leaving.
He turned out the lamp and went to sleep.
example_translate: Он выключил лампу и лёг спать.
turn out.synonyms:
Оказываться, выясняться - prove to be, end up, result
Выключать (свет, устройство) - switch off, extinguish, turn off
